hero.subtitle: Precision-engineered meal planning that adapts to your biology, preferences, and lifestyle in real-time.

HomePage.description: Precision-engineered meal planning that adapts to your biology, preferences, and lifestyle in real-time.
HomePage.featuresDesc: Our AI engine processes millions of data points to create a nutrition strategy as unique as your DNA.
HomePage.smartMealsDesc: Get suggestions based on your broad markers, activity levels, and palate preferences.
HomePage.mealGeneratorDesc: Instantly generate recipes from the ingredients already in your fridge.
HomePage.dailyPlansDesc: Dynamic scheduling that shifts with your calendar and metabolic needs.
HomePage.groceryDesc: Auto-optimized shopping lists categorized by aisle for peak efficiency.
HomePage.ctaDesc: Start your 14-day premium trial today. No credit card required.

AboutPage.heroDesc: At DietSync, we believe that optimal health isn't a guessing game. We've combined cutting-edge artificial intelligence with deep nutritional science to create a platform that understands your body as well as you do.
AboutPage.story1: Born out of the frustration of one-size-fits-all diet plans, DietSync was founded by a team of nutritionists, data scientists, and engineers who shared a common vision: to make personalized nutrition accessible to everyone.
AboutPage.story2: We realized that the human body is too complex for generic meal plans. Metabolism, lifestyle, genetics, and even daily stress levels play crucial roles in how we process food.
AboutPage.story3: Today, DietSync is more than just an app; it's a wellness companion that adapts to you.
AboutPage.communityDesc: We build for our users. Every feature, update, and recommendation is designed to empower our community.
AboutPage.scienceDesc: We rely on peer-reviewed nutritional science and evidence-based practices.
AboutPage.innovationDesc: We continuously improve our algorithms to provide the most accurate guidance.

ContactPage.subtitle: Have questions about your nutrition journey? Our team is here to help you achieve your goals.

ProfileSetupPage.precisionDesc: Our algorithm uses scientific metabolic markers to determine your exact requirements.
ProfileSetupPage.foodsDesc: Based on your goal, reducing these items will accelerate your progress.
ProfileSetupPage.nextDesc: Your dashboard is ready with a curated 7-day meal plan based on these results.
